### 2. Push to GitHub

Open your terminal (command prompt) in your project folder and run these commands one by one:

1.  **Initialize Git**:
    ```bash
    git init
    ```

2.  **Add all files**:
    ```bash
    git add .
    ```

3.  **Commit the changes**:
    ```bash
    git commit -m "Initial commit"
    ```

4.  **Link to your GitHub repository**:
    *(Replace `YOUR_USERNAME` and `YOUR_REPO_NAME` with your actual details)*
    ```bash
    git remote add origin https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/YOUR_REPO_NAME.git
    ```

5.  **Push the code**:
    ```bash
    git push -u origin main
    ```

Once this is done, your code will be on GitHub, and Vercel (if connected) will automatically start building your website.

### 2. Deploy and Connect Domain (Step-by-Step)

Follow these exact steps to deploy to Vercel and connect your domain:

#### **Step A: Push the Clean Code to GitHub**
Run these commands in your terminal:
```powershell
git add .
git commit -m "Final cleanup for Vercel"
git push origin main
```
*(If you get an error, use `git push -f origin main`)*

#### **Step B: Deploy on Vercel**
1.  Go to **[Vercel Dashboard](https://vercel.com/dashboard)**.
2.  Click **Add New...** > **Project**.
3.  Import your `bookmydoctor` repository.
4.  **Important:** Give it a unique project name (e.g., `bookmydoctor-app-v1`).
5.  Click **Deploy**.

#### **Step C: Connect `bookmydoctor.me`**
Once the deployment finishes and you see the success confetti:

1.  Click on **Settings** (top tab of your project in Vercel).
2.  Click on **Domains** (left sidebar).
3.  Type `bookmydoctor.me` in the input box and click **Add**.
4.  Select the recommended option (usually "Add to project").
5.  **Configure DNS**: Vercel will show you two values to add to your domain registrar (where you bought the domain, e.g., GoDaddy, Namecheap, Hostinger).
    *   **Type**: `A`
    *   **Name**: `@`
    *   **Value**: `76.76.21.21` (Vercel IP)
    *   *(If asked for CNAME for `www`)*: **Type**: `CNAME`, **Name**: `www`, **Value**: `cname.vercel-dns.com`.

Once you save these settings in your domain registrar, it usually takes 5-30 minutes for the domain to start working!

1️⃣ Homepage (Landing)

Goal: Immediately communicate your value proposition + get users to search doctors.

Logo

Hero Section:

CTA Button: “Search Doctors”

Step 1: Search & Select Doctor

Step 2: Choose Date & Time

Step 3: Confirm & Receive SMS/WhatsApp

Featured Specialties / Popular Doctors:

Grid of specialties: Dental, Dermatology, GP, etc.

Horizontal scrolling for mobile

Trust Signals:

Verified Clinics badge

Number of patients booked

Reviews / Testimonials

CTA Section:

“Book Your Appointment Today” → links to search

Footer:

About | Privacy Policy | Terms | Contact | Social Media

Photo + Name + Specialty

Consultation Fee

Ratings / Reviews

Languages spoken

Location / City

Insurance accepted

Availability (Today / This Week)

Pagination or infinite scroll

Doctor Photo + Name + Specialty + Experience Years

Consultation Fee

Reviews / Ratings

Languages

Available slots calendar

Goal: Make it easy for clinics to manage doctors & appointments

I'm currently focused on crystallizing the value proposition for "BookMyDoctor." My priority is to communicate the core benefit succinctly: the ability to instantly book verified doctors in Dubai. I am refining this messaging to highlight the SMS booking option as a key differentiator.


**Outlining Feature Set**

I've sketched out the initial feature set for the "BookMyDoctor" platform. I am prioritizing a user-friendly navigation structure: home, specialties, how it works, and dedicated sections for clinics and contact. I am designing a prominent search bar and refining filter options by city, specialty, insurance, and today's availability. I've also outlined detailed doctor profiles and booking workflows, including WhatsApp confirmation notifications and an "Add to Calendar" option. A dedicated section is planned to highlight clinic benefits, along with WhatsApp subscription for reminders. I also plan to use `gemini-3-flash-preview` for generation.


**Refining Technical Architecture**

I'm now diving into the code. I am focusing on implementation details. I'll update `types.ts` and `constants.ts` to include doctor properties and Dubai-specific data.
